description: [β.5.1] Sentinel gate mode 三档配置 (准则 6 行为弱耦合工程落地). Sir 准则 6.5 vocab 持久化: Sir CLI 可调, 不改源码 + git commit.
design_principle: 准则 6 升级版第 2 维: sentinel hard return → 渐进 soft → 最终 publish_only. 默认 hard 保留兼容. soft = publish_only + 仍 hard return (双轨观察期). publish_only = 完全交给主脑 LLM 决策, sentinel 只 publish 信号.

modes.hard: 原行为: return True/False. 不 publish 到 SWM (除 β.5.0-A 已加的拦截 publish).
modes.soft: 双轨: 仍 return True/False, 同时 publish 'gate_advice' 到 SWM. 主脑下次 prompt 看 evidence 但行为仍受 hard return 约束. 用于 β.5 早期观察期.
modes.publish_only: 永不 hard 拦: 永远 return True. 仅 publish 'gate_advice' 到 SWM. 主脑看 advice 自决是否说话 (走 stream_nudge reaction_space [SILENCE] 路径).

note_publish_only_partial: β.5.5-β.5.7 SmartNudge / Conductor / WellnessGuardian / ReturnSentinel 标 publish_only 是 SWM 信号语义 (它们 skip 时 publish gate_advice 到 SWM 让主脑看). 但内部仍有 hardcoded skip 规则 (greeting_cooldown / standby / 启动护栏 / 媒体窗口). NudgeGate / OfferGuard 是真正的 publish_only (永不 hard return). 这些 sentinel 改成真 publish_only 需 β.6+, 改 NudgeGate.can_speak 永远 True 已经覆盖了它们最终发声路径. β.6 Phase 2: ProactiveCare 加 vocab + push() 入口 publish_only 路径 (publish 'proactive_care_advice' SWM 让思考脑看 evi, 不直 push __NUDGE__). β.6 Phase 4: SoulEvaluator 加 vocab + publish_only 路径 (publish 'soul_alignment_advice' SWM 让思考脑看, 不直改 directive).

history.change: β.5.3 Sir 拍板完全重构: NudgeGate / OfferGuard hard → publish_only. 主脑看 SWM evidence 自决, 不再受 cooldown / freeze / sleep_mode hard 拦.

β.5.5-β.5.7 完整 publish-only: SmartNudge / Conductor / WellnessGuardian / ReturnSentinel skip 时 publish gate_advice 信号到 SWM. 主脑能看到所有 sentinel 的 'wanted-but-blocked' 决策. 紧急回滚: python scripts/gate_mode_dump.py --reset

β.6 Phase 2 + 4: 加 'ProactiveCare' + 'SoulEvaluator' 进 vocab, default publish_only. ProactiveCare.synth.push() 入口判 gate_mode → publish 'proactive_care_advice' SWM 让思考脑看 evi 自决 should_speak. SoulEvaluator publish 'soul_alignment_advice' SWM 让思考脑看 alignment score 自调 directive.

β.6 完整统一 (Sir 7:14 真痛 BUG + Sir 7:31 拍板): 4 daemon (SmartNudgeSentinel / Conductor / WellnessGuardian / CommitmentWatcher) 真退化 publish_only — daemon 不直 push __NUDGE__, 改 publish 'smart_nudge_candidate' / 'conductor_candidate' / 'wellness_candidate' / 'commitment_check_candidate' SWM event. 思考脑下次 tick 看 candidate + 全 SWM ctx 自决 SHOULD_SPEAK + SPEAK_CONTENT + SPEAK_STYLE. 治: SmartNudge 7:14+7:16 编 '02:43 番茄钟' 直推幻觉. ReturnSentinel 留 publish_only (但内部 greeting cooldown 仍 hard 拦, 等后续 β.6+ refactor) 保 Sir 起床即闻 morning greeting.

rollout_plan.phase_2_β.5.2: OfferGuard hard → soft + 观察 1 天
rollout_plan.phase_3_β.5.3: NudgeGate soft → publish_only (完全交主脑) + 观察 1 天
rollout_plan.phase_4_β.5.4+: OfferGuard / SmartNudge / Conductor 同路径 soft → publish_only

rollback: Sir 任何阶段觉得不稳, 用 scripts/gate_mode_dump.py 一行切回 hard. 立刻生效不需重启 (NudgeGate 每次 can_speak 时读 vocab).
